Homepage of Je Hon Tan

Graduate student in the George W. Woodruff School of Mechanical Engineering at Georgia Tech

My academic interest are in the fields of controls, robotics/mechatronics and artificial intelligence.

Outside of academics, I enjoy badminton, SCUBA diving, watching movies, playing video games and travelling.

Je Hon Tan
